markets.rules_primary: If Tariff is said by any Micron Technology, Inc. representative (including the operator of the call) during the next Micron Technology, Inc. post earnings analyst call (including the Q+A), then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: Video of the Micron Technology, Inc. earnings call will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Micron Technology, Inc. earnings call will be used. The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. Please see full rules for more details. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: For the purpose of this market, the Earnings Call Prepared Remarks will not count; only the post earnings analyst call will be used for resolution.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Venezuela / Cuba
markets.rules_primary: If Rachel Maddow says Venezuela / Cuba as part of next Rachel Maddow Show, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the next Rachel Maddow Show will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the next Rachel Maddow Show will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included. 
Plural nouns occurring within proper nouns and noun phrases (e.g. names, titles, etc) are included.
For the purpose of this market, the live broadcast or stream will be used to resolve this event. 
Additional content not included in the original broadcast or stream will not count. 
Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements will not. 
For the purposes of this market, 'next Rachel Maddow Show' refers to the next show in which Rachel Maddow participates live, occurring after March 16th, 2026 at 3:45 PM ET.
Except as otherwise specified, previously aired content, archival footage, and recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will not count.
Please see full rules for more details.
